name: SDLC Mixed Parallel Completion Order Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow proving order-independent parallel assessment completion.
outcome: Parallel assessments may resolve in either order without losing correctness.

definition.process_instructions: Two required assessors can complete in different orders across revisions. The control plane must preserve explicit subject lineage and the active revision only.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
